name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task
notes: This Building Block detects the use of cron utility to create a scheduled job.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Attempt, System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [sh or bash or zsh]

when the event matches ("Command" ILIKE '%crontab –l%' AND "Command" ILIKE '%egrep -v ‘^(#|$)’%' AND "Command" ILIKE '%/.Library/SystemServices/updateSystem%') OR ("Command Arguments" ILIKE '%crontab –l%' AND "Command Arguments" ILIKE '%egrep -v ‘^(#|$)’%' AND "Command Arguments" ILIKE '%/.Library/SystemServices/updateSystem%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Attempt, System.Process Creation Success
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of [sh or bash or zsh]

AND when the event matches ("Command" ILIKE '%crontab –l%' AND "Command" ILIKE '%egrep -v ‘^(#|$)’%' AND "Command" ILIKE '%/.Library/SystemServices/updateSystem%') OR ("Command Arguments" ILIKE '%crontab –l%' AND "Command Arguments" ILIKE '%egrep -v ‘^(#|$)’%' AND "Command Arguments" ILIKE '%/.Library/SystemServices/updateSystem%') AQL filter query
